title: Ask a question — Darren Jones MP
text_excerpt: Ask a question — Darren Jones MP 0 Skip to Content Darren Jones MP Ask for help Policy questions For schools Events About me About Bristol North West Contact Subscribe to mailing list > Open Menu Close Menu Darren Jones MP Ask for help Policy questions For schools Events About me About Bristol North West Contact Subscribe to mailing list > Open Menu Close Menu Ask for help Policy questions For schools Events About me About Bristol North West Contact Subscribe to mailing list > Ask a question. I have a small team but we work really hard to answer your questions. If you e-mail us, you’ll normally get a written response within four to six weeks. Mail handling and security checks in the House of Commons can cause substantial delays for letters sent via post. Remember, we can only answer residents who live in Bristol North West. Constituents can also to talk to me about any issues that are important to them at one of my constituency events . (Surgery calls are limited and therefore prioritised for constituents who are receiving casework support to resolve individual problems.) Please note, I’m required to manage conflicts of interest between my role as a constituency MP and a minister. That means that businesses or other organisations seeking to lobby about government policy or funding, whether directly or indirectly via constituents, must be referred to the Cabinet Office . Darren Jones MP, House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA darren.jones.mp@parliament.uk | 0117 959 6545 Website made with Squarespace . Read the Privacy Policy . This website has been designed to be accessible but there’s always more we can do to improve. Please contact us if you have feedback on accessibility and inclusivity.
